problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) — specifically Biomimetic surface structure — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.
